heroHeadline: Day 43: US Begins Hormuz Mine-Clearing Ops; Iran Claims 'Upper Hand' in Talks; 18+ Killed in Lebanon
heroSubtitle: Two US naval vessels began mine-clearing operations in the Strait of Hormuz as Iran ceasefire talks continue in Islamabad — Trump confirmed the operation publicly. Iran's Deputy FM declared Tehran holds the 'upper hand' in nuclear/ceasefire negotiations. Israeli bombardment killed at least 18 people across southern Lebanon. Pakistan dispatched fighter jets to Saudi Arabia, deepening its dual role as mediator and Gulf security provider.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-11. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent.
